messages.content: ugh my back is killing me, turning 41 next month and my body is letting me know lol

Ha, the body does have a way of sending those little "happy birthday" messages early! 😄

What's going on with it - is it something specific like sitting too long, or just kind of a general "everything hurts" situation?
spent the whole weekend assembling furniture for my daughter's dorm, she starts college in the fall

Oh wow, that's a big milestone - both the furniture assembly marathon AND your daughter heading off to college! No wonder your back is protesting, those flat-pack furniture pieces are basically a workout disguised as home improvement. 😅

How are you feeling about her going off to college? That's a pretty huge transition for the whole family.
my wife keeps telling me to stretch first and i keep not listening, classic

Ha, the classic "I know I should but..." move! To be fair, stretching before assembling furniture isn't exactly the first thing that comes to mind. But yeah, your wife might be earning some "I told you so" points on this one 😄

Are you at least doing some stretching now to try to recover, or still in full stubborn mode? 😂
anyway we're doing a little anniversary dinner friday, 15 years. trying to pick somewhere decent downtown

15 years, that's awesome - congratulations! And a nice dinner sounds like a perfect way to celebrate, especially after a weekend of hard work together getting your daughter ready for this next chapter.

Do you have a few places already in mind, or are you starting from scratch? And what's your vibe - like a cozy intimate spot, something a bit more lively, fancy tasting menu type thing? That might help narrow it down!
